violations.description: Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of . Observed Ribs and other meats had been vacuum sealed without a HACCP Plan.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Around grill and cooking areas had build up of grease. Refrigerator and Freezers need cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling above cooking area observed to have ceiling tape coming off.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
